message: Node started: Based on the geometric strategy provided, write a complete, single-file Python script named main.py. The script must read N and then N lines of xi, yi, ri from stdin. It must output N lines of x1 y1 x2 y2. Ensure the rectangles are [x1, x2) x [y1, y2), contain (xi, yi), stay within [0, 10000), and do not overlap. Use a robust, simple approach to ensure validity over high scores to avoid the zero-score penalty for overlaps.
